OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, used to filter the live stream events.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the OpenCTI live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

FORTISIEM_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the FortiSIEM Supervisor (e.g. https://fortisiem.example.com).

FORTISIEM_ORGANIZATION.description: FortiSIEM organization used to scope the REST API user (e.g. 'super').

FORTISIEM_WATCHLIST_ID.description: Numeric ID of the FortiSIEM Watch List that receives the IOCs.

FORTISIEM_ENTRY_AGE_OUT.description: Age-out applied to Watch List entries so they expire automatically (e.g. '30d').

FORTISIEM_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the FortiSIEM Supervisor.
